description: Horizontal 'Wall of Honor' memorial card. The background is a dark slate/stone texture with a soft-focus American flag (stars and stripes) in the upper-right and a cluster of red roses along the right side. The upper-left displays the white serif title 'Wall of Honor' next to an ICE/DHS badge emblem wrapped in a blue-and-white ribbon. Below that, white text reads: 'Customs Patrol Officer / George J. Spencer', a thin gold rule, 'End of Watch', another rule, and the date 'Monday, November 30, 1981'. The center-right features a large photograph of a gold badge inscribed 'U.S. CUSTOMS / THE DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY' and 'PATROL OFFICER' with number 271 and a central Treasury seal dated 1789.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Customs Patrol Officer George J. Spencer; End of Watch; Monday, November 30, 1981; U.S. CUSTOMS THE DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY PATROL OFFICER
